title: cyathea acrostichoides
intro: Cyathea acrostichoides, also known as the eastern or American tree fern, is a species of tree fern that is native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Cyathea acrostichoides include its potential to aid in wound healing and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to create teas and tinctures that are believed to promote overall well-being.
